title: Correction: p8 attention-state scout status
body: Correction to Pearly closeout note: Nebulous Ascending Supernova did return the read-only p8-attention-state UI/test scout. Arboreal Ripening Pollen's data/value scout directive still has not been marked seen or answered. Next session should use Nebulous's UI/test scope as input, but still re-ground and obtain/route the data/value scope before implementation claims open.
